category_sources: source_facts.description: Convert TTF files to EOT.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best documentation surface found from source_facts.homepage/repo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/wget/ttf2eot; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable name identify a CLI for converting TrueType fonts to Embedded OpenType.
